name: Clifton Williams
abstract: James Clifton Williams, Jr. (26 March 1923 Traskwood, Arkansas — 12 February 1976 Miami, Florida) was an American composer, pianist, French hornist, mellophonist, music theorist, conductor, and teacher.

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Watson
about_quotes.evidence: I studied with a man, his name was Clifton Williams... he taught me as a composer... I use that because... that was very exciting for me and I’ve never forgot that
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Watson interviewed by Michael Woods, Clinton, New York, January 19, 1996
